title: Multicolor Party Cannon (40cm) 1 Piece - Premium Celebration Confetti Launcher, Ideal for Birthdays, Weddings, and Special Events
features: MULTICOLOR PARTY CANNON: Elevate your celebration with vibrant multicolor confetti and make your events unforgettable. Perfect for birthdays, weddings, and special occasions, our confetti launcher adds a fun and exciting touch to your festivities.
ONE-PIECE LAUNCHER: Each 40cm premium celebration confetti cannon is sold as a single piece, ensuring every order provides you with the exact quantity you need for your guests to join in on the fun.

EASY-TO-USE & SAFE: Simple to operate with its user-friendly design, our handheld party cannon leaves you free to focus on the celebrations. Push down on the lever and send a dazzling display of confetti into the air to create lasting memories.

PREMIUM QUALITY: Crafted with top-notch materials, our confetti launcher ensures a reliable and dazzling performance each time. Confetti made from biodegradable and environmentally friendly materials makes sure your celebrations are eco-conscious.

IDEAL GIFT OR PARTY ACCESSORY: An impressive and essential party item that brings a touch of magic to your celebration. Our multicolor party cannon is the perfect choice, guaranteed to brighten any occasion.
